voice_adherence.weakest_moment: "Mày không bao giờ nghe người. Mày không bao giờ nghe người."
voice_adherence.fix: Bảo's dialogue should stay in his register—short, 3-5 words, defensive. Replace with something like: "Mày nghe ping. Mày nghe nhiễu. Người? Không. Chưa bao giờ." This keeps his cộc lốc voice while delivering the same emotional blow.
voice_adherence.note: The chapter nails the cold, surgical tone and the body-before-emotion principle. Cường's POV is consistently filtered through measurement and data. The weakest moment is Bảo slipping into a rhetorical rhythm that sounds like written prose rather than his established street register.

beat_coverage.weakest_moment: Beat 3 (Bảo recounts seeing Cường infiltrate Hemera two years ago) is delivered as summary narration rather than dramatized: "Mày lén mang Neural Mantle vào khu cách ly của Hemera."
beat_coverage.fix: Give Bảo one specific sensory detail from that memory—what he saw, what he smelled, what he felt when he witnessed it. Something like: "Tao đứng ngoài cửa kính. Mày cúi trên giường. Ánh đèn xanh chiếu lên tay mày. Tao thấy cáp." This grounds the accusation in lived experience rather than abstract statement.
beat_coverage.note: All four beats are present. Beat 1 (physical confrontation) is well-executed. Beat 2 (Bảo's accusation) is the chapter's strongest moment. Beat 3 is functional but summarized. Beat 4 (accounting skills activating) is excellent—Cường's brain automatically cross-referencing data feels true to character.

character_voice.weakest_moment: "Mày không bao giờ nghe, Cường. Mày nghe ping. Mày nghe nhiệt độ. Mày nghe nhiễu tín hiệu. Nhưng mày không nghe người. Mày không bao giờ nghe người."
character_voice.fix: Break this into Bảo's actual speech pattern—short, interrupted, defensive: "Mày nghe ping. Nghe nhiễu. Nghe nhiệt độ." Dừng. Xoa thái dương. "Người thì không. Chưa bao giờ." The pause and gesture make it feel spoken rather than written.
character_voice.note: Cường's voice is excellent—flat, observational, data-filtered. His internal accounting process is distinctive and well-rendered. Bảo's voice is mostly good but occasionally slips into rhetorical flourishes that don't match his 3-5 word street register. The moment he calls Cường by name works beautifully because it's established as rare and meaningful.

plants_seeded.weakest_moment: The reference to Khôi's death is somewhat exposition-heavy: "Người đàn ông ở Cumberland. Người mà nó giết. Khôi. Tao biết Khôi."
plants_seeded.fix: Let Bảo's grief show through his body language rather than direct statement. He could touch his own temple (near his scar) when mentioning Khôi, or his hand could shake harder, connecting Khôi's fate to his own injury without spelling it out.
plants_seeded.note: The Lan reveal is planted perfectly—the handwritten note in Cường's own accounting handwriting is a brilliant detail that feels earned. The 47.3 Hz frequency connecting to Patient 04-ĐM is seamless. The amplifier as potential tool/death sentence is well set up. The weakest plant is Khôi, who is introduced and explained rather than woven in.

prose_quality.weakest_sentence: "Cường đứng im. Không phải vì không muốn giật ra. Vì câu nói đập vào đâu đó sau trán anh — vị trí mà anh thường dùng để xử lý con số, đối chiếu cột A với cột B, tìm sai lệch."
prose_quality.fix: The metaphor is over-explained. Cut to: "Cường đứng im. Câu nói rơi vào đúng chỗ xử lý số liệu—sau trán, nơi đối chiếu cột A với cột B." Trust the reader to feel the impact without the explanation of why it hit.
prose_quality.strongest_sentence: "Mày đã khóa 90% nhận thức của cô ta, Cường. Chín mươi phần trăm. Mày để lại 10% — đủ để cô ta cảm nhận, đủ để cô ta phản ứng, đủ để cô ta biết mình đang bị chạm, nhưng không đủ để cô ta biết mình là ai."
prose_quality.note: Sentence variety is strong—fragments, long sensory sentences, data-dumps all coexist. The opening Cumberland description is vivid and specific. The accounting metaphor works throughout. The weakest tendency is occasional over-explanation of metaphors that would be more powerful left bare.

continuity.note: Excellent continuity from the previous chapter. Cường's immobile thumb, the 40 bpm secondary heartbeat, the transparent fluid leaking from the bruise, his realization that he is the exploiter—all carry forward seamlessly. His desperate flight to Bảo follows logically from his collapse on the bunker floor. The emotional trajectory (denial → confrontation → shattered denial) tracks perfectly.

violations: MAJOR: Chapter states Cường infiltrated Hemera's isolation ward and extracted data directly from Patient 04-ĐM. Canon (world.md) states Cường stole Neural Mantle from police evidence storage and is an accountant, not a technician. The infiltration of a secure medical facility and data extraction from a comatose patient requires skills and access he shouldn't have.

MODERATE: Chapter states Cường has visited Khu Nằm and knows bà Lành. This is new information not established in canon and seems unlikely given his profile as an underground user avoiding institutional contact.

MODERATE: The chapter implies Cường deliberately targeted a specific patient (Lan/Patient 04-ĐM) for extraction. Canon suggests the virtual lovers were rendered from his memories combined with patient data, not that he personally chose and extracted from a specific patient.
MINOR: Chapter references 'Chương bốn' (Chapter 4) as an in-story event, which is a meta-reference that breaks immersion.
canon_compliance.note: The emotional truth of the chapter is powerful, but the plot mechanics require significant canon adjustment. Either Cường's backstory needs revision (he had more technical skill/access than established) or the extraction method needs rethinking (perhaps he purchased pre-extracted data from Bảo or another intermediary).

lore_integration.weakest_moment: The Cumberland tunnel description, while atmospheric, could include more specific lore details about the Du Mục community that lives there.
lore_integration.fix: Add one or two details about the community—encrypted messages visible on a discarded screen, a warning symbol scratched into the wall, the specific smell of the makeshift Epsom substitute they use. This would make Cumberland feel lived-in rather than just scary.
lore_integration.note: The Neural Mantle technology does real work in this chapter—the extraction process, the 90/10 consciousness lock, the signal frequency, the bidirectional data flow all drive the plot and emotional revelation. The hoa sữa detail as emotional memory leaking through the system is brilliant lore integration. The amplifier as plot device is well-grounded in established technology.

engagement.weakest_moment: The middle section where Bảo explains what Cường did (the extraction, the consciousness lock) slows slightly because it's one character telling another what happened in the past.
engagement.fix: Intercut Bảo's explanation with more of Cường's physical reactions—the fluid spreading, the secondary heartbeat accelerating, his thumb twitching. Make the audience feel his body betraying him even as the truth is revealed.
engagement.note: The chapter maintains tension throughout. The Lan reveal is a genuine surprise that recontextualizes the entire story. The final image—Cường walking out with the amplifier, knowing it may kill him—is powerful. The weakest point is the exposition-heavy middle, but even that is carried by strong emotional stakes.

three_weakest_sentences: "Cường đứng im. Không phải vì không muốn giật ra. Vì câu nói đập vào đâu đó sau trán anh — vị trí mà anh thường dùng để xử lý con số, đối chiếu cột A với cột B, tìm sai lệch."
"Trong khoảng tắt, bóng tối tràn tới, và trong bóng tối, Cường nghe nhịp đập trong ngực mình. 40 lần/phút. Hoặc 8 lần/phút. Hoặc nhịp của thứ gì đó đang đếm theo cách riêng."
"Và hình dáng đó giống một cái chạm. Không phải cái chạm của nàng — 36.8°C, áp suất chính xác, độ ẩm hoàn hảo. Cái chạm thật. Thô. Lạnh. Không đều."
three_strongest_sentences: "Mày đã khóa 90% nhận thức của cô ta, Cường. Chín mươi phần trăm. Mày để lại 10% — đủ để cô ta cảm nhận, đủ để cô ta phản ứng, đủ để cô ta biết mình đang bị chạm, nhưng không đủ để cô ta biết mình là ai."
"Lan. Phòng 4. St. Vincent. 47.3 Hz. Nguồn render: Bệnh nhân 04-ĐM."
"Mày đã chết rồi. Chỉ là cơ thể mày chưa nhận ra."
ai_patterns_detected: Occasional over-explanation of metaphors (the accounting brain metaphor, the pixel-edge memory metaphor) where the image alone would suffice
Slight uniformity in paragraph rhythm in the middle section—several paragraphs follow the same pattern of statement, elaboration, emotional beat
Bảo's longer speeches occasionally read as written prose rather than spoken language, particularly when he delivers thematic statements
top_3_revisions: Revise the extraction backstory to fit canon: Cường purchased pre-extracted patient data from Bảo (who had institutional access as a former Du Mục with medical contacts) rather than personally infiltrating Hemera's isolation ward. This preserves Cường's accountant profile while maintaining Bảo's complicity and guilt.

Tighten Bảo's dialogue to match his established 3-5 word register. His longer speeches should be broken by physical actions (xoa thái dương, run, nheo mắt) and incomplete sentences. The thematic content should emerge from what he doesn't say as much as what he does.

Cut the meta-reference to 'Chương bốn' and replace with a specific memory: 'Lần đầu tao thấy mày. Tiệm sửa thiết bị góc Dixon. Mày hỏi mua cáp. Tao nói dừng. Mày không nghe.' This grounds the warning in a concrete scene rather than a chapter number.
new_canon_entries: Cường's handwritten note documenting the extraction source exists (found by Bảo three months prior)
Cường locked 90% of Lan's consciousness, leaving only 10% (sensation and reaction without self-awareness)
A Du Mục named Khôi was killed by the entity in Cumberland after he stopped extracting and recognized it was looking back at him
Bảo witnessed Cường's infiltration of Hemera's isolation ward two years ago (requires canon revision)
Bảo possesses a Generation 4 signal amplifier
Cường has visited Khu Nằm and knows bà Lành (requires canon revision)
The hoa sữa scent originates from Lan's emotional memory, not from code or Cường's memories
Cường has now made 852 landings (up from 847)
